meta.title: OpenAlive — Keep your Windows session active
meta.description: A lightweight, private, open source Windows utility that keeps your session active. No telemetry, no accounts. 8 languages.

hero.title: Keep your session alive.
hero.subtitle: A lightweight, private utility that keeps your Windows session active — so you stay logged in, available, and uninterrupted.

features.title: Everything it does — and nothing it shouldn't

mouse.title: Mouse simulation
mouse.desc: Tiny, configurable cursor moves at a set interval — barely noticeable, enough to stay active.

keyboard.title: Keyboard simulation
keyboard.desc: Sends a harmless key — Shift, F13, ScrollLock and more — on a schedule you control.

schedule.title: Schedule control
schedule.desc: Define work hours and an optional lunch break. OpenAlive only acts when you want it to.

tray.title: System tray
tray.desc: Lives quietly in the tray. Green when active, gray when idle — your state at a glance.

languages.title: 8 languages
languages.desc: Switch language live, no restart. English, Español, Português and five more.

autostart.title: Autostart
autostart.desc: Optionally launches with Windows. No admin rights, no fuss.

privacy.title: Privacy first
privacy.desc: No telemetry, no network calls, no accounts. It never leaves your machine.

download.title: Download OpenAlive
download.subtitle: One small installer. No admin rights. Installs in seconds.
download.requirements: Windows 10 (1903+) or Windows 11 · ~13 MB RAM · ~25 MB disk

showcase.title: Three tabs. That's the whole app.

footer.tagline: Keep your Windows session active. Lightweight, private, multilingual.
